intent: 2-bedroom with a single common T&B, but with a public/private zone-split for sleeping-side acoustic privacy. The bath sits between the two bedrooms; a small hallway notch on the dividing-wall side connects both bedrooms and the bath, and bridges to dining for guest access. LDK is open-plan with dining + kitchen side-by-side at the rear.
must_haves: single common bath shared by both bedrooms
bath between bedrooms with a hall notch
public/private wall buffering sleeping side from LDK
dining and kitchen side-by-side at the rear (open-plan LDK)
